title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Kolte-Patil Developers

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Kolte-Patil Developers
jsonLd.description:
We at Kolte-Patil Developers are looking for an experienced Real Estate Agent based out of Rajkot. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Kolte-Patil Developers:
Kolte-Patil Developers is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Kolte-Patil Developers!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
